title: Nasha - The Dope | Ashutosh Pratihast & Pankaj Oberoi #partysong #newrelease #viralsong
description:

NASHA - The Dope | Party Music 2023 | By Ashutosh Pratihast & Pankaj Oberoi

Lyrics - 

Teri Ankhiyaan da Chadheya Nasha ni Nasha ni Nasha ni Nasha ni Nasha ni
Vekh Ho Gaya Main Jag ton Juda ni Juda ni Juda ni Juda ni Juda ni
Mera Kamm Utte Ankh ae Jahan di Jahan di Jahan di Jahan di Jahan di 
Taiyon Khabraan ch Rehnda Sadda Naa (Name) naiyo Naa naiyo Naa naiyo Naa naiyo Naa naii...

(Pankaj Oberoi's Verse)

Aaja Tod Dun Main Saare Tere Veham
Jab Chalun Khulla Ladun Deke Maarun Muh Pe Cash Vaishh...
Aaiyon Taish Me Naa, Haath Jaaye Dash Me Naa
Daal Dunga Goli Baahar Niklegi Ye A*$$ se Naa
School Mafia Se Koi Mere Batch me Naa
Laash Mili Jheel Se Saboot Mere Bag Se Haaan
Use Flex Par Yakeeen, Mere Facts Pe Naaa
Mujhe Boli Badaa Dumm Tere Legs me Haaan
Test Me Naa Fail, Grade Har Baari Same
Gelaan Raat Guzaar Subeh Dedun Tujhe Fame
Galle Chaali tolaa chain
Khatirr Chaar Gun-men
Mere Dhore Konyaa Tem (Time)
Tu Ghulaam, Main Hun Baadshah.........

Teri Ankhiyaan da Chadheya Nasha ni Nasha ni Nasha ni Nasha ni Nasha ni
Vekh Ho Gaya Main Jag ton Juda ni Juda ni Juda ni Juda ni Juda ni
Mera Kamm Utte Ankh ae Jahan di Jahan di Jahan di Jahan di Jahan di 
Taiyon Khabraan ch Rehnda Sadda Naa (Name) naiyo Naa naiyo Naa naiyo Naa naiyo Naa naii...

(Ashutosh Pratihast's Verse)

Gaadi Bhaaje Katii Tezzz, Sauda Aar Paaaar
Gael Naache Chhori Angrez, Mere Chaar Yaaar
Bera Konya k Karwa k Maanegi Yo Chhori
Yaar Kave Mera Bhai Yo Cheez Kati G*#**d Faaaad...

Chaalan Roz Gelyaan Maut Ka Samaan Leke
Fate Me Taang Naa De Hum To Banda Taang Dete
Dekhe Hai k Tu Ghoor Ghoor Saale Khaaoga ke?
Baith Meri Gael Duniya Aaaalo k Suaaad Lete

Loaded Dunaali Dashboard Pe Raakhi Ae
Re Veham Kaaad De re Yo Se Veham ki Dawaa
Makhaa Kitno k Khaatar Kabar Khod Raakhi Ae
Re Bairi Mere Jal Jal Ho Jaaange Sawaaa......

Teri Ankhiyaan da Chadheya Nasha ni Nasha ni Nasha ni Nasha ni Nasha ni
Vekh Ho Gaya Main Jag ton Juda ni Juda ni Juda ni Juda ni Juda ni
Mera Kamm Utte Ankh ae Jahan di Jahan di Jahan di Jahan di Jahan di 
Taiyon Khabraan ch Rehnda Sadda Naa (Name) naiyo Naa naiyo Naa naiyo Naa naiyo Naa naii...

Ho Gaya Ae Tera Nashaa Billo Raniye Ni Ho Gayaa Aee Tera Nashaaa
Vekh Hogyaa Main Jagg ton Judaa Billo Raniye Ni Hogya Main Jag ton Judaaaa.....

___________________________________________________________


Welcome to Swarmandal Studios, where music comes alive! Get ready to immerse yourself in the intoxicating beats of "NASHA - The Dope," a sizzling party anthem that will ignite your senses and make you groove like never before. Join us on this electrifying musical journey created by the dynamic duo, Ashutosh Pratihast and Pankaj Oberoi.

In this exhilarating YouTube video, we present "NASHA - The Dope," a chart-topping sensation that will set your party scene ablaze. Let the pulsating rhythm and infectious energy of this track transport you to a world where music is the ultimate high.

With its fusion of genres, "NASHA - The Dope" delivers a spellbinding mix of electronic beats, vibrant hip-hop elements, and exhilarating pop melodies. This foot-tapping composition will make your body move uncontrollably to its irresistible groove, creating an irresistible urge to hit the dance floor.

With richly layered production and a seamless blend of vocal harmonies, Ashutosh Pratihast and Pankaj Oberoi bring their unique musical prowess to the forefront. Their collaboration infuses "NASHA - The Dope" with a distinctive sound, showcasing their combined talent and creativity. Get ready to be blown away by their infectious charisma and undeniable stage presence.
